subcodes.first_line: O Hájar! Be thou an emigrant in the love of God, that is, flee from all that dwell on earth and abide secure beneath the shade of the Tree of Divine love
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا هاجر ان اهجری عن کل النفوس و لاتهجری عن حب ربک الذی کان علی العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @nearness and remoteness
